news.paragraph: Okta has recently experienced a stock slide even as the broader market rose, though some Wall Street analysts maintain bullish views on the company. There are no specific upcoming earnings or product catalysts mentioned in the recent headlines, but the identity security sector remains active due to evolving AI-related threats. Traders should consider this mix of recent price weakness and positive analyst sentiment when evaluating contract volatility.
